violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

Establishment was observed vacuum packaging cooked meatballs and shrimp. Establishment is to stop vacuum packing until approval is granted from RIDOH. Meatballs and shrimp were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, mac and cheese was placed hot in the 2 door reach-in refrigerator, in containers greater than four inches deep. Mac and cheese was moved to sheet pans and placed into the walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fans and both ice machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
